plugins.name: agent-toolkit
plugins.description: 4 interactive slash commands (/implement, /fix, /refactor, /agent-issue) with simplify-before-each-commit discipline + 19 skills covering planning, TDD, simplification, refactoring strategy, code review, debugging, security, API design, performance, migrations, and git workflow, plus an automated PR-review pipeline (code-review-bot + code-review-refuter skills with scripts/render-review.mjs).
